name: @openclaw/memory-palace
description: Memory Palace MCP-backed memory plugin for OpenClaw

scripts.validate:manifest: bun test index.test.ts --test-name-pattern "(keeps the static plugin manifest schema exactly aligned with runtime schema|publishes the OpenClaw extension entry from dist/index.js)"
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run validate:manifest && python ../../scripts/openclaw_memory_palace.py stage-package
scripts.test: bun test src/client.test.ts src/smart-extraction.test.ts src/assistant-derived.test.ts src/host-bridge.test.ts src/runtime-layout.test.ts src/onboarding-tools.test.ts src/prompt-safety.test.ts src/visual-redaction.test.ts src/acl-search.test.ts src/reflection.test.ts src/lifecycle-hooks.test.ts index.test.ts
